classes.title: ballet
classes.description: A classical dance form demanding grace and precision.
classes.text1: Ballet is a highly $technical$ form of dance with its own vocabulary based on French terminology. It is known for its grace, precision, and ethereal quality. Ballet dancers often perform on pointe, using specialized shoes that allow them to dance on the tips of their toes. The art form emphasizes fluid movements, elegant lines, and expressive storytelling through dance. Ballet has a rich history and has evolved over centuries, influencing many other dance styles and continuing to be a foundational discipline in the world of dance.
classes.text2: Experience the elegance and discipline of ballet in our foundational classes.

classes.title: contemporary
classes.description: A genre that blends elements of various dance styles, focusing on fluidity and expression.
classes.text1: Contemporary dance is a dynamic and $expressive$ dance form that combines elements from various dance styles, including modern, jazz, ballet, and lyrical dance. It emphasizes fluidity of movement, emotional expression, and the use of the entire body to convey a story or theme. Contemporary dance often explores abstract concepts and allows dancers to experiment with different techniques and styles, making it a versatile and evolving art form.
classes.text2: Express yourself through movement in our contemporary dance classes, where creativity meets technique.

classes.title: hip hop
classes.description: A high-energy dance style that combines elements of street dance.
classes.text1: Hip-hop dance is a $high-energy$ style that originated from street dance cultures. It includes a variety of moves such as breaking, locking, and popping. Hip-hop is characterized by its rhythmic and expressive movements, often performed to hip-hop music. It emphasizes individuality, creativity, and improvisation, making it a dynamic and evolving dance form.
classes.text2: Get your groove on and learn the latest hip-hop moves in our energetic classes.

classes.title: commercial
classes.description: A dance style often seen in music videos and live performances, characterized by its dynamic and entertaining moves.
classes.text1: Commercial dance is a $versatile and dynamic$ dance style often seen in music videos, live performances, and television shows. It combines elements from various dance genres, including jazz, hip-hop, and contemporary dance, to create high-energy routines that are visually engaging and entertaining. Commercial dance emphasizes sharp, precise movements, synchronization, and showmanship, making it a popular choice for dancers looking to work in the entertainment industry.
classes.text2: Step into the spotlight and master the art of commercial dance with our exciting classes.

classes.title: modern dance
classes.description: A dance form that emphasizes creative expression and often breaks traditional dance conventions.
classes.text1: Modern dance is a dance form that emerged in the early 20th century as a reaction against the rigid techniques of classical ballet. It emphasizes $creative expression$, individuality, and the exploration of new movement possibilities. Modern dance often incorporates elements of improvisation and focuses on the use of gravity, weight, and natural body movements. It breaks traditional dance conventions and allows dancers to express emotions and ideas through innovative choreography and performance styles.
classes.text2: Discover the freedom of movement and self-expression in our modern dance classes.
